scripts.test: node scripts/events.test.mjs && node scripts/live-status.test.mjs && node scripts/twitch.test.mjs && node scripts/videos.test.mjs && node scripts/shorts.test.mjs && node scripts/taxonomy.test.mjs && node scripts/dispatch.test.mjs && node scripts/metrics.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/e2e-filters.test.mjs && node scripts/e2e-video-modal.test.mjs && node scripts/e2e-navigation.test.mjs && node scripts/e2e-contact.test.mjs && node scripts/e2e-calendar-modal.test.mjs && node scripts/e2e-category-modal.test.mjs
scripts.preview: sed -i.bak -E 's/new URL\(serializedManifest\.[a-zA-Z]*\)/new URL("http:\/\/localhost")/g' dist/server/entry.mjs && astro preview
scripts.devbuild: npm run build && npm run dev
scripts.start:full: npm run refresh-content && npm run build && npm run dev
scripts.start:clean: rm -rf node_modules/.vite dist .astro && npm run refresh-content && npm run build && npm run dev
